gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/113)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/113)
text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَلْطَعُ الْقَصْعَةَ وَ يَقُولُ مَنْ لَطَعَ قَصْعَةً فَكَأَنَّمَا تَصَدَّقَ بِمِثْلِهَا .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Khashab, from Ibn Baqqa, from Amro Bin Jumi’a,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> used to lick the plate (no left-over) and he<sup>saww</sup> was saying: ‘The one who licks a plate (no left-over), so it is as if he has given in charity with the likes of it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Khashshab from ibn Baqqah from ‘Amr ibn Jami’ who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah, when eating would wipe the dish clean and say, “Whoever, wipes the dish clean is as if has given charity as much.’””
